Ashu_eggs.name: Emby
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Emby
⚙️ Version: 2.1
❓ What is it: In short, you can have your own Netflix. Emby is a media server designed to organize, play, and stream audio and video to a variety of devices.
🐞 Bugs fixed/changelogs: 
   • The way the download is done has changed, it will now always install the latest version
   • Now the Egg is not dependent on updates, everything is done by scripts, which results in better maintenance.
   • The code is now cleaner.
  📦Docker:
     • Docker Updated (Dotnet Version: 6.0.13)
     • ARM compatibility added
     • Now there is no need to switch between 64x and ARM64. Use the image: ashu11a/emby:latest
     • (2.1) Dotnet 8 image added.
👑 Author: Ashu
👀 Check for updates: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs

Ashu_eggs.name: Frp
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Frp
⚙️ Version: 2.2
❓ What is it: A fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the Internet.
🐞 Bugs fixed/changelogs:
• Now the Egg is not dependent on updates, everything is done by scripts, which results in better maintenance.
• The code is now cleaner.
• New Variables: 
   • Frps or Frpc?
   • Install Example?
•  2.1: Update to the new FRP system (.toml)
•  2.2: Docker changed from ubuntu/debian to alpine (lighter)
⚠️ Attention:
❗️This Egg requires at least 4 ports (go to startup in the panel, and specify the ports, it's complicated to handle, just tag me if you need help.)
📖 Windows will detect Frp as a virus due to Port Tunneling.
🚫If you already have this Egg installed on a server, a reinstallation will be necessary (Make a backup of your files first.)
👑 Author: Ashu
👀 Check for updates: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs
Ashu_eggs.author: Matheusn.biolowons@gmail.com

Ashu_eggs.name: Frp
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Frp
⚙️ Versão: 2.2
❓ Oque é: Um proxy reverso rápido para ajudá-lo a expor um servidor local atrás de um NAT ou firewall à Internet.
🐛 Bugs corrigidos/changelogs:
• Agora o Egg não é dependente de atualizações, tudo é feito por scripts, o que ocasiona na sua melhor manutenção.
• Código agora está mais limpo.
• Novas Variáveis: 
   • Frps ou Frpc?
   • Instalar Exemplo?
•  2.1: Atualização para o novo sistema do FRP (.toml)
•  2.2: Mudança do docker de ubuntu/debian para alpine (mais leve)
⚠️ Atenção:
❗️Esse Egg necessita de no mínimo 4 portas(vá para startup no painel, e especifique as portas, é complicado de se mexer, qualquer coisa me marca.)
📛O Windows irá detectar o Frp como vírus, por causa do Tunelamento de Portas.
🚫Se você já houver esse Egg instado em algum servidor, será necessário fazer uma reinstalação (Faça um backup das suas coisas antes.)
👑 Autor: Ashu

Ashu_eggs.name: Paneldactyl
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Paneldactyl
⚙️ Version: 1.3
What is it: An easy and practical way to test other panels. With this Egg, you can install a Pterodactyl/Jexactyl panel on your own panel, literally a Panel inside another Panel (Panel only, Wings is for another Egg, if I can manage).
Bug fixes/changelogs:
 - (1.0) Release.
 - (1.0) Ability to run subcommands in the terminal (composer, setup, database, migrate, user, build, reinstall).
 - (1.0) System that checks "file integrity" (reinstalls if something is not installed).
 - (1.0) Possibility to build the panel (better for those who want to create their own themes/customizations).
 - (1.0) System that checks if the Egg is up to date.
 - (1.0) Everything is done via scripts, for better maintenance and updating.
 - (1.1) Added developer mode.
 - (1.1) Possibility to clone Dashboards directly from GitHub (Public/Private).
    📝 Variables: 
        - (1.0) Version.
        - (1.0) Panel `(Pterodactyl, Jexactyl, Jexactyl Brasil)`.
        - (1.0) Update warnings.
        - (1.1) Developer Mode
        - (1.1) GIT repository URL
        - (1.1) Choose the branch
        - (1.1) Git Username
        - (1.1) Git Access Token
        - (1.1) Change in the installation script.
        - (1.3) Change nodejs version management to NVM
    Docker: 
         - ARM64, ARM, 64x compatibility
⚠️ Attention:
   ❗️ A database is required.
Ashu_eggs.author: Matheusn.biolowons@gmail.com

Ashu_eggs.name: Paneldactyl
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Paneldacty
⚙️ Versão: 1.3
O que é: Uma maneira fácil e prática de testar outros painéis. Com esse Egg, você pode instalar um painel Pterodactyl/Jexactyl em seu próprio painel, literalmente um Painel dentro de outro Painel (somente Painel, Wings é para outro Egg, se eu conseguir).
Correções de bugs/changelogs:
 - (1.0) Lançamento.
 - (1.0) Capacidade de executar subcomandos no terminal (composer, setup, banco de dados, migrate, user, build, reinstall).
 - (1.0) Sistema que verifica a “integridade do arquivo” (reinstala se algo não estiver instalado).
 - (1,0) Possibilidade de construir o painel (melhor para aqueles que querem criar seus próprios temas/personalizações).
 - (1,0) Sistema que verifica se o Egg está atualizado.
 - (1.0) Tudo é feito por scripts, melhor manutenção e atualização.
 - (1.1) Adicionado o modo de desenvolvedor.
 - (1.1) Possibilidade de clonar Dashboards diretamente do GitHub (Público/Privado).
    📝 Variáveis: 
        - (1.0) Versão.
        - (1.0) Painel `(Pterodactyl, Jexactyl, Jexactyl Brasil)`.
        - (1.0) Avisos de atualização.
        - (1.1) Modo Desenvolvedor
        - (1.1) URL do repositório GIT
        - (1.1) Escolha a ramificação
        - (1.1) Nome de usuário do Git
        - (1.1) Token de acesso ao Git
        - (1.1) Alteração no script de instalação.
        - (1,3) Alterar o gerenciamento de versão do nodejs para NVM
    Docker: 
         - Compatibilidade com ARM64, ARM, 64x
⚠️ Atenção:
   ❗️ Banco de dados é necessário
Ashu_eggs.author: Matheusn.biolowons@gmail.com

Ashu_eggs.name: Paper (Super-Optimized)
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Paper (Super-Optimized)
⚙️ Version: 1.3
❓ What it is: An offshoot of the high-performance Spigot that aims to fix gameplay and mechanical inconsistencies, but now with a super optimization path by Ashu.
🐛 Bug fixes/changelogs:
- (1.0) Release.
- (1.0) Everything is scripted, better maintenance and updating.
- (1.2) Possibility of denying the installation of Plugins.
- (1.3) Updating images
What's different?
- List of optimizations: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs/blob/main/Paper%20Optimized
- This Egg has several Optimizations in the default files.
- There is a variable called Optimization that changes the initialization argument which significantly improves performance.
📦 Docker: 
- ARM64, 64x compatibility
Author: Ashu
👀 Check for updates: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs

🐛 Fixed bugs/changelogs:

• (4.0) The Egg is no longer dependent on updates, everything is done by scripts, resulting in better maintenance.

• (4.0) Variables translated.
• (4.1) Added Docker Dotnet 8
• (5.0) Images changed to Alpine
• (5.1) New mod sync system
• (5.1) Startup command changed from ./install.sh to ./start.sh

🪄 What's different?
   • Unified Docker (same image, multiple architectures).
   • Works on both ARM64 and 64x with the same performance.
   • No Emulation.
       📝 Variables that other Eggs don't contain: 
             • Seed.
             • Optimization.
             • Security.

Ashu_eggs.name: Valkey
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Valkey
⚙️ Version: 1.0
❓ What it is: Valkey is an open-source (3-clause BSD license) in-memory data structure store, used as a database, cache, and message broker. It is a community-driven fork of Redis, created to maintain a fully open codebase after Redis transitioned to more restrictive licensing. It supports data structures such as strings, hashes, lists, sets, sorted sets with range queries, bitmaps, hyperloglogs, geospatial indexes with radius queries, and streams.

🐛 Fixed bugs/changelogs: 
      • (1.0) Release

👑 Author: Ashu
👀 Check for updates: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs
Ashu_eggs.author: Matheusn.biolowons@gmail.com

💎 Egg: Valkey
⚙️ Versão: 1.0
❓ Oque é: O Valkey é um armazenamento de estrutura de dados em memória de código aberto (licença BSD de 3 cláusulas), utilizado como banco de dados, cache e message broker (intermediário de mensagens). Trata-se de um fork do Redis impulsionado pela comunidade, criado para manter uma base de código totalmente aberta após a transição do Redis para um licenciamento mais restritivo. Ele oferece suporte a estruturas de dados como strings, hashes, listas, conjuntos (sets), conjuntos ordenados (sorted sets) com consultas de intervalo, bitmaps, hyperloglogs, índices geoespaciais com consultas de raio e fluxos (streams).

🐛 Bugs corrigidos/changelogs: 
      • (1.0) Lançamento

👑 Autor: Ashu
👀 Verifique por atualizações: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs
Ashu_eggs.author: Matheusn.biolowons@gmail.com

Ashu_eggs.name: Xray-core
Ashu_eggs.description:
💎 Egg: Xray-core
⚙️ Version: 1.0
❓ What is it: Xray is an advanced proxy system that creates encrypted tunnels disguised as common web traffic, allowing you to bypass blocks and censorship with high discretion. It connects your device to a secure server flexibly.
🐛 Bug fixes/changelogs: 
      • (1.0) Release (VMess + TCP Stream Support).

Freedom is a right, not a privilege.
👑 Author: Ashu
👀 Check for updates: https://github.com/Ashu11-A/Ashu_eggs
